Brokerages remain cautious on the long-term recovery outlook, citing rising competition, execution challenges and the need for sustained operational improvements.

title: Multibaggers: 15 stocks with 25%+ sales and profit growth in Q4 March 2026
summary: ETMarkets analysis identified 15 multibagger stocks delivering 125%-617% returns within a year, backed by over 25% growth in sales and profits during the March 2026 quarter, signalling strong business momentum.

title: PC Jeweller shares soar 14% on Q4 PAT jumps 58% YoY, strong management commentary
summary: Shares of PC Jeweller surged 14% after the company reported a 58% year-on-year rise in Q4 net profit to Rs 150 crore. Strong consumer demand and steady sales momentum boosted performance, with quarterly revenue climbing 33% to Rs 927 crore. For FY26, revenue jumped 49% to Rs 3,353 crore compared with the previous financial year.

title: Nomura downgrades Cummins India shares to Neutral despite raising target price by 25%. Here’s why
summary: Nomura downgraded Cummins India to “Neutral” despite raising its target price by 25%, citing stretched valuations and near-term margin pressure from rising commodity costs. While the brokerage remains optimistic about long-term growth driven by data centres and emission norm upgrades, it believes the current valuation leaves limited room for further upside.

title: Vedanta shares jump 2% to hit fresh 52-week high. What’s behind the surge?
summary: Vedanta shares hit a fresh record high after ICRA upgraded the company’s long-term credit rating to AA+ with a stable outlook, marking its highest domestic rating in over a decade. The upgrade reflects stronger profitability, improving leverage metrics and expectations of continued healthy cash flow generation following the group’s ongoing demerger process.

title: Buyback boom: India Inc announces  ₹25,000 crore worth of offers, highest in 3 years
summary: Data shows that companies have announced buyback of shares worth  ₹25,000 crore this year so far, the highest since 2023, when the figure stood at  ₹48,452.32 crore. In 2025, it was  ₹19,175 crore and in 2024 at  ₹13,539 crore.

title: Vijay Kedia makes a strong case for simpler market taxation, believes it is time to end STT
summary: Vijay Kedia advocates for the abolition of the Securities Transaction Tax (STT) in India, claiming it has become an unnecessary burden on investors. He argues that reducing transaction costs could boost retail market participation and strengthen capital markets' role in economic growth.

title: Sensex crashes 1,100 points, investors lose  ₹6 lakh crore; what drove the stock market down today?
summary: The Sensex ended 1,092 points, or 1.44%, lower at 74,775.74, while its NSE counterpart, Nifty 50, settled at 23,547.75, down 359 points, or 1.50%.

title: Yaashvi Jewellers IPO allotment date likely today. GMP, steps to check share allotment status for SME IPO
summary: Yaashvi Jewellers IPO allotment date is likely today, 29 May 2026. Investors can check Yaashvi Jewellers IPO allotment status online through the websites of BSE and the IPO registrar. Bigshare Services is the Yaashvi Jewellers IPO registrar.

title: Hitachi Energy's additional capex excites, but valuations are steep
summary: Hitachi stock trades at a whopping 115 times FY27 estimated earnings, as per Bloomberg data, making it one of the most expensive stocks in the capital goods sector.

title: Crude oil prices slide 19% in May, post worst monthly fall since 2020; Will US-Iran peace deal deepen losses?
summary: Crude oil prices fell on 29 May after tentative US-Iran ceasefire talks raised hopes for smoother oil flows. Brent crude dropped nearly 19% in May, while WTI hovered around $87. Ongoing discussions may impact future prices amid geopolitical uncertainties.

title: Asian Paints Q4 results: Net profit jumps 69% YoY to  ₹1,185.5 crore, volume growth at 12.4%; declares  ₹23 dividend
summary: Asian Paints Q4 results: The company’s revenue from operations in Q4FY26 grew 10.62% to  ₹9,246.70 crore from  ₹8,358.91 crore, year-on-year (YoY). Asian Paint’s Decorative Business (India) delivered a volume growth of 12.4%, with value growth of 10.2%.

title: Looking to enter the bond market now? Here are the best options for investors
summary: For now, bond markets are likely to remain sensitive to both global energy prices and domestic inflation trends, while any ease in these pressures could help improve stability in yields going forward, according to experts.

summary: AVI Polymers' share price reached a 5% upper circuit of  ₹15.21 on BSE after announcing a board meeting on June 4, 2026, to discuss a potential stock split and bonus issue, alongside plans for expansion into sustainability-focused business segments.

summary: SAR Televenture share price has fallen over 7% in one month, and has declined more than 45% on a year-to-date (YTD) basis. The SME stock has plunged over 48% in one year.

title: Smallcap stocks nearing attractive entry point? Here’s what Bajaj Finserv AMC study says
summary: Nifty Smallcap 100 index has surged nearly 9% over the past three months, significantly outperforming the benchmark Nifty 50 index, which has declined more than 5% during the same period. Over a six-month horizon, the small-cap index has gained over 3%, while the Nifty 50 has fallen 8.8%.

title: India may drive 30% of emerging-market pet adoption growth: Royal Canin's Satinder Singh
summary: Royal Canin says India could account for about 30% of emerging-market pet adoption growth over the next five years, even as low packaged pet food penetration leaves significant room for premiumization.

title: Beyond the Carton: Inside Tetra Pak's India Expansion
summary: Tetra Pak has evolved in India over 40 years, expanding into food processing and recycling. Its Chakan plant, operational since 2012, manufactures 85% of equipment locally. The company focuses on sustainability and reducing food waste through innovative packaging solutions.

title: Filing ITR this year? Here are 5 important changes in the income tax forms
summary: The income tax filing season has begun, allowing online submissions for ITR-1, ITR-2, and ITR-4. Taxpayers are advised to wait until mid-June for Form 16. Here are the changes in the income tax forms.

summary: Smart credit card usage can boost savings and protect your finances. Timely payments, low credit utilisation and reward point tracking help avoid debt and improve your credit score.

summary: Five-year health insurance moratorium reduces wrongful claim rejections for genuine non-disclosures while preserving fraud checks, so policyholders must stay transparent and maintain continuous cover for protection.

title: Sebi drops disclosure case against NDTV, closes proceedings without penalty
summary: Sebi has closed adjudication proceedings against NDTV without penalty, concluding the company did not violate disclosure requirements. The decision follows a 2022 Securities Appellate Tribunal ruling that the 2009 loan agreement did not constitute a change in control.

summary: The ratings agency said Reliance benefits from "counter-cyclical business segments, significant international exposure (with over one-third of revenues derived from exports), and limited reliance on government-linked revenues," which support its ability to generate stable earnings across business cycles.

summary: ​Nine large-cap stocks, including Solar Industries and Adani group companies, hit fresh 52-week highs even as the Sensex slipped over 1,000 points.​

title: ET Alpha Wealth Summit: Mapping the road to India’s next growth wave
summary: India's strong economic growth faces scrutiny as global conditions remain uncertain. The ET Alpha Wealth Summit on June 4 in Mumbai will feature top economists and finance experts to analyze the durability of India's growth momentum. Discussions will cover consumption vs. investment-led growth, private capex revival, and wealth creation opportunities.

title: Small-cap stock inches close to 52-week high despite stock market crash

title: Non MF-retail ownership on NSE-listed firms falls to five year low in March 2026
summary: Tepid earnings growth over the past 18 months and war-induced elevated crude prices are behind the decline. However, combined with retail flows through MFs, total individual ownership stands at 18.7%, exceeding FPI holdings of 15.8% as of FY26-end.

title: US stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq set to extend record run as investors eye US-Iran peace deal updates
summary: S&amp;P 500 was on track for a ninth consecutive weekly gain, its longest winning streak since December 2023. The Dow Jones and the Nasdaq were also set to end the week higher, with all three indices set for a second straight month of gains.

title: Expert view: Poor monsoon may impact earnings; defence a multi-year growth story, says Baroda BNP Paribas MF CIO
summary: Expert view: Sanjay Chawla, Chief Investment Officer (CIO) – Equity, Baroda BNP Paribas Mutual Fund, remains confident about India’s earnings growth story, but added that a near-normal monsoon would be crucial to sustaining that growth momentum.

title: IndiGo Q4 Results 2026: Aviation firm posts net loss of  ₹2,537 crore versus profit last year, revenue up 1%
summary: InterGlobe Aviation reported a consolidated net loss of  ₹2,537 crore for the March quarter, down from a profit of  ₹3,067.5 crore last year. Revenue rose 1% to  ₹22,438 crore, while EBITDA increased to  ₹6,396 crore with an EBITDA margin of 3.6%.

summary: In a regulatory filing to stock exchanges, UGRO said the proposed compensation for Shachindra Nath is at or below market median, as independently confirmed by Aon, one of the world's foremost compensation advisory firms.

title: CCI dismisses complaint against Rapido over alleged predatory pricing, says no abuse of dominance
summary: The complainant had alleged that Rapido was allowing private vehicles to operate commercially in Uttarakhand, charging fares below the minimum rates prescribed by the state authorities and adopting opaque pricing as well as tax-related practices.

title: Form 26AS replaced with Form 168: What changes for taxpayers under the new Income Tax Act, 2025?
summary: Form 26AS, used for taxes verification, will be replaced by the new Form 168 under the Income Tax Act, 2025. This auto-generated statement will provide comprehensive tax-related information starting from the 2026-27 tax year. Details here.

summary: Retirement planning needs more than FDs and debt mutual funds. Smart SIP investing in equity mutual funds can help build a  ₹1 crore retirement corpus while beating inflation.&nbsp;

summary: A 30-year-old earning  ₹1 lakh monthly saves  ₹40,000 but seeks guidance on investment allocation. ChatGPT advises a balanced approach, suggesting increased equity exposure while maintaining emergency funds and conservative options like mutual funds and recurring deposits for long-term growth.

title: I asked ChatGPT, how can I prevent my electricity bill from shooting up in Delhi's blistering heat
summary: As Delhi swelters with day-time temperatures reaching 43 degrees Celsius and prolonged heat wave conditions, I ask ChatGPT to devise a strategy that prevents my electricity bill from shooting up this summer.

title: Fed Governor Michelle Bowman warns against hiking interest rates because of inflation spike
summary: Bowman said reacting to the inflation surge, driven primarily by energy prices and tariffs, has proven ineffective.

title: Supreme Court provides relief to Reliance in 2007 securities market fraud case
summary: Reliance Industries Ltd received relief from India's Supreme Court. The court overturned a lower court ruling and a 2020 order by the markets regulator. This order had alleged manipulative trading practices by the company. The Supreme Court directed SEBI to refund 2.5 billion rupees to Reliance. The case involved a stake sale in Reliance Petroleum Ltd.

title: PB Fintech sees Rs 665 crore block deal as founders pare stake; Goldman among other top funds buy
summary: PB Fintech founders Yashish Dahiya and Alok Bansal sold 38 lakh shares worth Rs 665 crore in a block deal. The shares were purchased by various institutional investors, including Goldman Sachs and Tata Mutual Fund, following the company's recent performance.

title: Sebi appoints Upma Chawdhry as MSE chairperson, only woman currently to head an Indian market infra institution
summary: SEBI approved retired IAS officer Upma Chawdhry as chairperson of the Metropolitan Stock Exchange of India. She is the only woman currently heading an Indian market infrastructure institution, bringing extensive expertise in governance and public policy to the exchange.

title: Sebi fines Suzlon Energy Rs 29 crore for misleading financial statements; promoters, executives also penalised
summary: SEBI has fined Suzlon Energy Rs 29 crore and several former executives for misrepresenting financial statements, inflating profits via circular transactions, and failing to disclose contingent liabilities, actions deemed serious violations of market regulations and disclosure norms.

title: Sebi eases nomination rules for demat accounts, mutual funds. Check full details
summary: SEBI has relaxed nomination norms for demat accounts and mutual funds starting September 1, 2026. Nomination is mandatory for single holders unless opted out, but optional for joint accounts. The process is simplified, reducing documentation and enabling digital submissions.

title: Wall Street gains as investors await details on Iran deal, Dell surges 30%, Hewlett Packard jumps 15%
summary: At 10:05 a.m. ET, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.30%, the S&amp;P 500 gained 0.41%, the Nasdaq Composite surged 0.58%

title: Rupee rout grounds IndiGo, airline slips to FY26 loss
summary: IndiGo swung to a  ₹2,393.6 crore loss in FY26, its first since FY23, as an 11% rupee depreciation inflated dollar-denominated lease costs. Weak demand, falling load factors, and rising fuel costs compounded the pain even as revenues grew modestly.

title: Asian Paints flags West Asia war as demand risk despite strong FY26 earnings
summary: Asian Paints posted revenue and profit ahead of Street estimates in FY26, driven by cost efficiencies and price hikes. But the West Asia war, sticky input costs, and intense competition cloud the near-term demand outlook.

title: Sebi slaps  ₹29 crore penalties on Suzlon Energy, former executives for financial misrepresentation
summary: Sebi said Suzlon structured transactions between its subsidiaries in a manner that artificially inflated profits, net worth and investor perception, even though the dealings lacked genuine economic substance.

title: Bond tokenisation explained: How it works and what are the benefits and risks
summary: SEBI plans to pilot corporate bond tokenization to deepen India's debt markets. This move aims to enhance settlement speed and transparency, making corporate bonds more accessible to retail investors. Here are the benefits and risks associated with it.

title: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana: Eligibility, subsidy benefits, and how households can apply for the scheme
summary: The PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana, initiated in February 2024, supports rooftop solar setups for households. The scheme offers up to 300 units of free electricity per month. Details here.

title: 8th Pay Commission key updates: Nationwide consultations in full swing — 10 FAQs answered
summary: Check out the latest updates on the 8th Pay Commission as of 29 May 2026, including an extension of the memorandum submission deadline and the announcement of a Kolkata visit.
